title: Asuka Irony
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Irony             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 11, 2006 3:31 pm A short blurb I wanted to mention that I found interesting/recently realized. Isn't it ironic how Kyouko ends up committing suicede due to a synch-ratio accident to have Asuka attempt suicede in 24/24'? Also, this thought just dawned on me the other day, but you know how in 22', Asuka's mom kept saying "Die together with me"? Well, in 25', that's pretty much what happens to them... :shock: Anno's a genius at irony. Talk amongst yourselves and discuss!

[]: serious a'             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Sun Oct 15, 2006 12:32 am that why eva's my favortie oh the irony... gotta love Asuka just before she died though...and before

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Oct 15, 2006 6:25 am This kind of thing ocurs so often in Evangelion the phenomenon has been dubbed " The Irony Bomb".

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 15, 2006 7:31 pm True. Though from what I understand, the REAL Irony Bomb is Misato's...um...attitude in episode 23/23'...

[]: Asuka that popular one             Quote Post by Analog-Nub » Wed Oct 25, 2006 7:25 pm Man that girl is popular.

Also, this thought just dawned on me the other day, but you know how in 22', Asuka's mom kept saying "Die together with me"? Well, in 25', that's pretty much what happens to them... :shock: Anno's a genius at irony. Talk amongst yourselves and discuss!
